description: User dwells on the 6:10am flight option, hovering over the price button.
frame_description: The user is viewing departing flight options from Adelaide to Melbourne.

description: User clicks the price button to view available fare types for the Virgin Australia flight.
The 'Select Departing Fare Type' section expands, displaying Lite, Choice, and other fare options.
User reviews the fare details and baggage allowances for the 'Lite' fare.
User clicks the 'SELECT' button for the Lite fare.
A loading overlay appears with the message 'Good choice!' while the next page loads.
The application navigates to the 'Select Return Flight' page.
frame_description: The user is now presented with return flight options from Melbourne to Adelaide.
